name: libhtml-form-perl
title: libhtml-form-perl
summary: module that represents an HTML form element
description:
module that represents an HTML form element
Objects of the HTML::Form class represents a single HTML <form> ... </form>
instance. A form consists of a sequence of inputs that usually have names,
and which can take on various values. The state of a form can be tweaked and
it can then be asked to provide HTTP::Request objects that can be passed to
the request() method of LWP::UserAgent.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libhtml-form-perl because module that represents an HTML form element.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libhtml-form-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libhtml-form-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libhtml-form-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
